headline: D.R. Horton (DHI) Beats Annual Revenue Forecast Estimates
summary: D.R. Horton, Inc. (NYSE:DHI) is one of the 10 Best Housing Stocks to Buy in 2026. On April 21, Reuters reported that D.R. Horton, Inc. (NYSE:DHI) reduced its revenue projection for 2026, but it is still above expectations. The firm guided consolidated revenue to $33.5 billion-$34.5 billion. It lowered the higher end from $35 billion […]

headline: EMCOR Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates, Both Rise Y/Y, Stock Up
summary: EME's shares jump after Q1 earnings and revenues beat estimates, fueled by strong demand, margin gains and a raised 2026 guidance.
